data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices on the site to enhance decision-making.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Design improves user interaction efficiency with target sizes.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas, predictable path movements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design enhances usability perception.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Organizes content to reflect limited short-term memory capacity.
data.technical_spec: Chunking of information, organized content blocks.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design aligns with user familiarity from similar sites.
